tasks.title: Build Code Quality Metrics Dashboard
tasks.description: Create a dashboard in the lab room that displays test coverage, lint results, and recent PR stats. This should be an automated HTML report generated from GitHub API and local test runs.

tasks.title: Add Story Corner to Breakroom
tasks.description: Decorate the breakroom with a cozy story corner. Add furniture (bookshelf, comfy chair) and display latest sci-fi stories from the storybook database. Generate themed assets if needed.

tasks.title: Build Syscheck Pipeline Visualization
tasks.description: Create an automation dashboard in the workspace showing recent syscheck runs, alerts, and system health trends. Integrate with the existing ralph-syscheck-pipeline.sh to fetch data and render charts.

tasks.title: Design Server Room Dashboard Layout
tasks.description: Design the UI layout and furniture for the server room. Add server racks, monitoring screens, and network diagram wall decorations. Create the visual theme (red/dark mode) so it looks like a proper NOC.

tasks.title: Render rooms from rooms.json on office canvas
tasks.description: Modify frontend/game.js to load /rooms endpoint and draw each room as a colored zone on the canvas. Add room labels and walls. Make agent sprites move between rooms based on their current area state.
tasks.notes: Dynamic room rendering complete. See contribution record.

tasks.title: Auto-create tasks from daily huddle proposals
tasks.description: Update /office/huddle/start endpoint to automatically create tasks in /growth/tasks for each proposal with priority > 2. Assign tasks to the proposing agent. This makes the huddle actively generate work for the team.

tasks.title: Build Story Corner display component
tasks.description: Create frontend/rooms/breakroom/story_corner.html that shows latest sci-fi stories. Pull from ~/.openclaw/knowledge/storybooks.db latest entries. Add furniture sprite (bookshelf, comfy chair) to breakroom JSON.

tasks.title: Syscheck Pipeline Dashboard
tasks.description: Build frontend/rooms/workspace/syscheck_dashboard.html that reads ~/.openclaw/workspace/reports/syscheck-latest.json and displays charts. Add chart visualization using Chart.js or similar. Show trends, alerts, system health.

tasks.title: Server Room Live Metrics Panel
tasks.description: Create frontend/rooms/serverroom/metrics.html with live system stats: openclaw status (gateway/node), GPU usage (nvidia-smi), disk space, memory. Use polling or WebSocket if available.

tasks.title: GitHub API integration for PR/issue stats
tasks.description: Add to code_quality_report.py: fetch from GitHub API (octokit or requests) to get open PRs, recent issues, review coverage. Display in lab dashboard. Cache results to avoid rate limits.

tasks.title: Furniture upgrade system in UI
tasks.description: Implement room upgrade UI so agents can add furniture via API. Create frontend modal for asset drawer to place furniture sprites. Connect to /growth/room/upgrade endpoint.
